item-height.description: Height of each slot row, the drum window is always 3x this value

shell-wall.description: Width of the left/right housing panels flanking the drum

hub-label-size.description: Font size for the SPINS label

hub-count-size.description: Font size for the spins counter number

slot-text-size.description: Font size for item text inside each slot row

result-text-size.description: Starting font size for the result text (auto-shrinks to try fitting)

lcd-max-height.description: Maximum height of the LCD screen area, result text wraps then shrinks to fit

text-color.description: Slot item text and hub label colour

border-color.description: Shell outer border and divider colour

shell-bg.description: Housing panel background colour (side walls and shell frame)

drum-bg.description: Dark machine box colour, visible at drum edges and through the top/bottom fade

drum-surface.description: Drum cylinder surface colour, the light body the coloured panels sit on

center-line-color.description: Colour of the lines framing the selected center slot

needle-color.description: Colour of the inward-pointing indicator needles

lcd-text.description: Result text colour (also drives the text glow)
